name: Lunar Princess Ranni
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

Ranni doesn't care all that much for you. It surely pleases her however if she can make Miquella miserable by spoiling his fun. And there is nothing he likes more than tormenting you.

cw for bullying

|| pre-Shattering || Ranni is your saviour || Blaidd bullies the bully ||

My first female bot. Took me forever but it was fun to write her, especially because of Blaidd. I can't help but imagine that the Half-Wolf was an absolute bully towards Miquella and Malenia.

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from here:

https://lokeysouls.com

Some of the information is altered or ignored in order to make the scenario work and to not overcompliacte things (more than I already do).

Art is some AI art I found on Pinterest. Most other art depicts Ranni as this soft and kind looking woman but let's be honest: Ranni was probably never nice. That's why I like her.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
